title: ferray-fft: no hfft2/ihfft2/hfftn/ihfftn — only 1D Hermitian FFT
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides hfft and ihfft only as 1D operations (no hfft2/hfftn). ferray-fft matches this — hfft and ihfft are 1D only. This is actually at parity with NumPy. However, NumPy's hfft docs note that multi-dimensional Hermitian FFTs can be composed from 1D operations. No action needed unless NumPy adds ND Hermitian FFTs in future.
